    Class ImageGlb

    Image data used to create a texture. Image MAY be referenced by an URI (or IRI) or a buffer view index.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public sealed class ImageGlb : LogicalChildOfRoot, IExtraProperties, IChildOf<GlbData>

    Properties

    Name Description
    AlternateWriteFileName

    When set to a FileName or a relative File Path, it will be used as the file name of the texture being written.
    When null, a default file name will be used.
    Content

    Gets or sets the in-memory representation of the image file.
